strings.string: Show the date line beneath the time.
Crank up the show: denser, faster fireworks all day and night, patriotic bunting across the top, a spotlit flag, and a biplane that trails a star-spangled pennant now and then.
Rockets rise from the field and burst overhead through the evening and night.
Mark the Semiquincentennial — a golden "1776 ★ 2026" banner celebrating 250 years of American independence.
Occasional field visitors cross the scene — a soaring bald eagle, a grazing deer, a hopping rabbit or a fluttering butterfly by day; an owl, a red fox, a raccoon or a darting bat by night.
Steps for a full progress bar. Set 0 to use the watch's own daily step goal.
